---
title: "nitrix.stats.lme.flame"
generated: true
signature-hash: 4683f6c6d81f2026
description: "FLAME-style two-level mixed-effects model for fMRI group analysis."
listing:
  id: nitrix-stats-lme-flame-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-stats-lme-flame/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.lme.flame`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
FLAME-style two-level mixed-effects model for fMRI group analysis.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-stats-lme-flame-symbols}
:::
